a:I[5878,["310","static/chunks/310-3f33d6a97cfc3ded.js","878","static/chunks/878-dbfa2cbdd3c38aab.js","537","static/chunks/app/concerts/%5Bslug%5D/page-b53e91132b9dacfa.js"],"Image"]
b:Tc10,<p data-end="150" data-start="82"><strong data-end="115" data-start="82"><span style="font-size: 18px;">INK WARUNTORN x SERIOUS BACON -&nbsp;</span></strong><strong data-end="150" data-start="118"><span style="font-size: 18px;">First Live in Singapore 🇸🇬 (85% SOLD OUT!)</span></strong></p><p data-end="150" data-start="82"><span style="background-color: transparent;">One night. One stage. Two T-pop acts.&nbsp;</span>A special collaboration in Singapore - for a night of Thai pop music you don&rsquo;t see often.<br>If their songs have ever been on your late-night playlist&hellip; this is where you finally hear them live.</p><p data-end="746" data-start="656">This isn&rsquo;t just another concert. It&rsquo;s a night made specially for the T-pop fans in Singapore!</p><p data-end="299" data-start="246">📅 31 July 2026 (Fri)<br data-start="267" data-end="270">📍 Gateway Theatre, 3615 Jalan Bukit Merah, Singapore 159461<br data-start="288" data-end="291">🕗 Show starts 8:00PM</p><p data-end="299" data-start="246"><strong>TICKET PRICES:</strong><br>CAT A - 208 SGD (SOLD OUT)<br>CAT B - 178 SGD<br>CAT C - 148 SGD<br>CAT D - 118 SGD<br>CAT E - 98 SGD</p><p data-end="836" data-start="753"><strong data-end="770" data-start="753">INK WARUNTORN ❤️</strong><br>A leading voice in Thailand&rsquo;s modern pop scene, <strong data-end="206" data-start="189">Ink Waruntorn</strong> is known for her signature soft, emotive sound and relatable storytelling. Her releases consistently top Thai streaming charts, with multiple hits surpassing tens of millions of streams across platforms.</p><p data-end="592" data-start="414">She has performed at major festivals and sold-out shows across Thailand, building a strong regional fanbase with music that resonates deeply with listeners across Southeast Asia.<br><br></p><p data-end="967" data-start="838"><strong data-end="855" data-start="838">SERIOUS BACON 🥓</strong><br><strong data-end="639" data-start="622">Serious Bacon</strong> is a rising Thai pop duo recognised for their catchy, heartfelt songs and fresh take on everyday love stories. Their tracks have gained massive traction online, with viral hits and strong streaming numbers making them a favourite among younger audiences.</p><p data-end="1058" data-start="898">With a growing presence in live performances and festivals, they&rsquo;ve quickly established themselves as one of the most exciting new acts in Thailand&rsquo;s pop scene.</p><p data-end="1058" data-start="898"><br></p><p data-end="1058" data-start="898"><span class="fr-video fr-fvc fr-dvb fr-draggable" contenteditable="false" draggable="true"><iframe width="640" height="360" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/qyKVXta1vVY?&list=RDqyKVXta1vVY&start_radio=1&wmode=opaque" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen="" class="fr-draggable"></iframe></span><br></p><p data-end="1058" data-start="898"><img src="https://tm-prod-event-files-v3.s3.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com/5f781aad2d3611f1915501117567899b/description/a58364ee4fbe11f1911101117567899b.png" style="width: 401px;" class="fr-fic fr-dib"></p>e:{"d":"M8 2v4","key":"1cmpym"}
